hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: this repo has a knowledge graph (graphify-out/graph.json). For orientation questions (what calls X, how do A and B relate, where does Y live), `graphify query \"<question>\"`, `graphify path \"<A>\" \"<B>\"`, or `graphify explain \"<concept>\"` returns a scoped subgraph far cheaper than grepping. Grepping for exact strings you already intend to edit or debug is fine."}}'   || true ;; esac
